title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running LLMs (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) locally with a simple API and Docker support.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API for chat, generate, embed, pull, and list operations.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node.js and browsers, providing typed methods for chat, generate, embeddings, and model management.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama as a local LLM provider for chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama WebUI) for chatting, managing models, and building local AI apps; now renamed to Open WebUI.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java SDK for Ollama with fluent builders, streaming, and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollamapy
summary: Lightweight community Python client that exposes Ollama endpoints with Pydantic models and retry logic.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for chatting, pulling, and benchmarking Ollama models with syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental VS Code extension that brings local LLM code completions via Ollama.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration that registers Ollama as a Generator and Embedder for production-grade RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node enabling no-code workflows to chat, generate text, and pull models from an Ollama instance.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama with idiomatic client, streaming blocks, and model management methods.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Minimal Next.js chatbot template that connects to Ollama via the OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker Compose examples for CPU and GPU (NVIDIA) deployments with volume mounts.

title: ollama-rag-qa
summary: Streamlit app demonstrating retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# SDK targeting .NET 6+ with async enumerable streaming and dependency injection helpers.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a local AI assistant sidebar powered by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger module for CI/CD pipelines that spins up ephemeral Ollama services and runs model tests in containers.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library generated from the OpenAPI spec, providing typed structs and streaming support.
